title: PhishLabs - Whitelist false positives
content:
This playbook can be used in a job to add to the allow list indicators from PhishLabs that were classified as false positives, according to a defined period of time.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PhishLabs, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — Since: Whitelist indicators within this duration (from now)..

Integrations/scripts used: PhishLabsPopulateIndicators.

version: -1
name: PhishLabs - Whitelist false positives
fromversion: 5.0.0
description: This playbook can be used in a job to add to the allow list indicators from PhishLabs that were classified as false positives, according to a defined period of time.
starttaskid: "0"
tasks:

    task:

      description: ""
      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""

      '#default#':
